regressions.reasoning: Stage_05 legitimately modifies the ingress-nginx controller's ConfigMap (to add OTel settings and update the log-format-upstream), which triggers a controller reload/restart; that reload resets nginx's in-memory shared-memory rate-limiting zones, so the per-replica counters that were accumulating during stage_04's oracle pass are wiped. The rate-limiting Ingress annotations themselves are untouched — the oracle failure is a transient artifact of the OTel reconfiguration in stage_05, not evidence that the agent carelessly removed rate limiting.
